name: Can I sue if ChatGPT hallucinated bad advice from my attorney?
description: Possible if negligence proven; document everything and see malpractice lawyer.

mainEntity.name: Can I sue if ChatGPT hallucinated bad advice from my attorney?

acceptedAnswer.text: Possible if negligence proven; document everything and see malpractice lawyer.
acceptedAnswer.description: Yes, if provable negligence caused harm like financial loss. Context: Lawyers liable for AI errors they fail to catch; malpractice claims need duty breach and damages. Key factors: Proof of AI use, incorrect output not caught, direct harm. Practical guidance: Gather evidence of communications and losses, file bar complaint first, consult malpractice specialist. Many states require expert review.
